tweaks.name: System Colors
tweaks.description: Customize iOS system colors including label, background, tint, and all semantic colors.
tweaks.author: Nnnnnnn274

tweaks.name: Status Bar Cleaner
tweaks.description: Hides the location breadcrumb banner and No Service status bar item.
tweaks.author: Nnnnnnn274

tweaks.name: Disable Today View
tweaks.description: Blocks the Today widget screen from appearing when swiping left on the home screen.
tweaks.author: Nnnnnnn274

tweaks.name: Icon Shake
tweaks.description: Shakes home screen icons when you tap, driven by live CABasicAnimation on each icon's CALayer (RemoteCall). Includes an always-wiggle mode.
tweaks.author: Nnnnnnn274
